audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass provides a 50% off discount on Boston Harbor Island Ferry tickets for up to 4 people. This pass is a digital discount code. You will receive the code via email after reserving this pass. You will submit the discount code when purchasing tickets online at www.bostonharbo

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass provides a 50% off discount on Boston Harbor Island Ferry tickets for up to 4 people. This pass is a digital discount code. You will receive the code via email after reserving this pass. You will submit the discount code when purchasing tickets online at www.bostonharborislands.org . The discount code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below: Georges Island May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays June 16 - September 1: every day
